title: briza media f. alpestris
intro: Briza media f. alpestris, also known as alpine quaking grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Briza media f. alpestris include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
